game_name: Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter

element_introduction_order.element: Basic starfighter piloting (X-Wing or TIE Fighter selection)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player selects craft and squadron role before engaging
Player chooses squadron type affecting combat role and tactics

element_introduction_order.element: Enemy fighter engagements (TIE Fighters, TIE Bombers, Assault Gunboats)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Various enemy craft types require different tactical approaches

element_introduction_order.element: Capital ship combat (Star Destroyers, Interdictor Cruisers)
element_introduction_order.first_appears: Mid-to-late campaign missions (Balance of Power expansion)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Large stationary targets in Rebel and Imperial campaigns

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Final mission - Rebel campaign (Balance of Power)

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Spreading the Rebellion campaign - defensive extraction mission type
Additional pilot-able craft expanding combat options

typical_relief_triggers: Mission completion and return to hangar
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Mission-based intensity with player agency in craft/squadron selection; tension builds through engagement escalation; relief comes from successful mission completion or disengagement

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory missions with basic fighter-vs-fighter combat; player learns craft handling and squadron mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating enemy formations and tactical complexity; introduction of multiple craft types and tactical roles
difficulty_curve.late_game: Capital ship engagements; large-scale campaign objectives; Balance of Power expansion features 15-mission parallel campaign arcs with strategic scope expansion
notable_spikes: Super Star Destroyer Vengeance assault (final Rebel campaign mission)
Rebel factory destruction (final Imperial campaign mission)
Interdictor Cruiser capture sequence (strategic mission type)

notable_level_patterns.description: Multiplayer arena combat up to 8 players; no story context; pure skill-based engagement
Structured team play with player-selected squadron role; faction-based (Rebel vs Imperial)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Cooperative team missions in Balance of Power

notable_level_patterns.pattern_name: Campaign narrative arc (Balance of Power only)
notable_level_patterns.description: Parallel Rebel and Imperial campaigns; 15 missions each with story progression; alternate endings based on faction choice
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Spreading the Rebellion (Rebel) / Imperial Task Force - Vengeance (Imperial)

notable_level_patterns.description: Large stationary or slow-moving targets; typically final mission type; require sustained attack coordination
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Vengeance Super Star Destroyer assault; Rebel factory destruction

notable_level_patterns.description: Defensive positioning around objective; protect allies or assets during vulnerable periods
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Base evacuation scenario (Balance of Power Rebel campaign)
